title: Implement zero-schema optimizer indexing, score workbench, and agent utilities

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Wave 1 scope: zero-schema optimizer indexing in task attachments, shared optimizer-results service, CLI/MCP discovery tools, and a score-page Optimizer workbench using existing scoreId indexes plus ScoreVersion.isFeatured as the pinned marker. No GraphQL schema additions or GSI changes in this wave.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Continuing wave 1 implementation on feature/zero-schema-optimizer-workbench. Scope for this lane: shared optimizer-results service backed by task attachments + Procedure.metadata pointers, then first CLI path, then frontend score-page Optimizer tab. Intentionally ignoring unrelated optimizer-run tweaks in the same clone and avoiding edits to other dirty files.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented zero-schema optimizer workbench wave 1 on feature/zero-schema-optimizer-workbench. Added OptimizerResultsService with canonical task-attachment artifacts (manifest/events/runtime.log), auto-indexing from optimizer state persistence, CLI commands (score optimizer-runs / optimizer-candidates / promotion-packet, procedure index-optimizer-run), MCP tools for the same flows, and a new score-page Optimizer tab with Runs + Versions panes plus runtime-log/event-stream viewing. Verified with: python -m pytest plexus/cli/shared/optimizer_results_test.py plexus/cli/procedure/test_storage_metadata_preservation.py (6 passed); npm test -- --runInBand components/ui/__tests__/score-optimizer-workbench.test.tsx (1 passed); npm run typecheck -- --pretty false (passed); live CLI smoke: indexed Prescriber procedure 695a6bcd-f17c-4d04-ae68-358a5e2cfe0b and successfully listed indexed runs, aggregated candidates, and emitted a promotion packet.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Refining the zero-schema workbench frontend shape. Replacing the score-level Optimizer tab with: (1) score-scoped Procedures / Evaluations views launched from the score ellipsis menu using the existing scorecards-dashboard replacement-panel pattern used by Analyze Feedback, and (2) version-scoped Procedures / Evaluations tabs inside score detail for the selected version. Shared components will back both scopes, with chronological default sorting and optimizer-metric-aware sorting only where manifest metrics exist.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented the frontend reshape for zero-schema optimizer discovery: removed the score-level Optimizer tab, added score-level View Procedures / View Evaluations menu actions using the score-detail replacement-panel pattern, and added version-scoped Procedures / Evaluations tabs inside score detail. Added shared score procedure/evaluation list components and focused tests; dashboard typecheck and focused Jest suites pass. CLI read-model smoke check also passed: procedure index-optimizer-run + score optimizer-runs + score promotion-packet agree on the Prescriber winning version/eval IDs.
